productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Eqt Nitro Fashion Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed to streamline your running, the EQT Nitro Fashion from adidas is a great buy for those who love to burn the trails. Packed with features and a stylish upper, this running shoe is a perfect blend of comfort, performance and style.UpperSynthetic leather upper with self print and adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sidesHas a velvetty heel cup overlay for enhanced durabilityMeshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfortCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorptionMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durabilityWaffle and geometrical pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionSoft-Cell unit in the heel for absolute cushioned comfortTorsion system for absolute midfoot supportOutsole embeded onto the upper as a toe guard for enhanced forefoot protectionshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
